summary: Comprehensive testing of iPad-Verwaltungssystem with 1:n iPad-Student relationship. Fixed critical bug in delete_student that only freed ONE iPad when students can have up to 3 iPads (1:n). All backend tests pass (10/10). Frontend UI fully functional with correct 'Limit erreicht' display.

critical.issue: FIXED: Bug where delete_student only freed ONE iPad instead of ALL iPads when student has multiple (1:n). Used find_one instead of find().to_list() for active_assignments.

issues: No footer element present - minor UX consideration

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: delete_student and batch_delete_students now correctly handle 1:n relationships by iterating through ALL active assignments instead of just one

tested_features.IMPORT_STANDARD_1_1: PASS - Excel import with backward compatibility works
tested_features.IMPORT_1_N_MERGE: PASS - Students on multiple rows correctly merged
tested_features.IMPORT_LIMIT_ENFORCEMENT: PASS - Max 3 iPads per student enforced, excess skipped
tested_features.EXPORT_FORMAT: PASS - One row per assignment, student data duplicated
tested_features.EXPORT_REIMPORT: PASS - Exported file can be re-imported correctly
tested_features.MANUAL_ASSIGNMENT_BUTTON: PASS - 'iPad zuordnen' button visible for <3 iPads
tested_features.MANUAL_ASSIGNMENT_DIALOG: PASS - Dialog shows available iPads (IT-007, IT-008)
tested_features.LIMIT_REACHED_DISPLAY: PASS - 'Limit erreicht' button shown/disabled for Peter Müller
tested_features.STUDENT_CREATE: PASS - 'Neuen Schüler anlegen' button and dialog work
tested_features.STUDENT_DELETE: PASS - Delete now correctly frees ALL assigned iPads (1:n fixed)
tested_features.IPAD_STATUS: PASS - Status overview shows OK/Defekt/Gestohlen counts
tested_features.IPAD_CREATE: PASS - 'Neues iPad anlegen' button and dialog work
tested_features.IPAD_DELETE: PASS - Delete only allowed when not assigned
tested_features.ZUORDNUNGEN_TAB: PASS - Shows all 7 assignments with export button
tested_features.EINSTELLUNGEN_TAB: PASS - Shows Globale Einstellungen and Bestandsliste Export

bug_fix_details.root_cause: With 1:n relationships, students can have up to 3 iPads. The delete functions used find_one() which only found ONE active assignment, leaving other iPads in orphaned state with current_assignment_id pointing to deleted assignments.
bug_fix_details.fix: Changed find_one() to find().to_list() and added loop to iterate through ALL active assignments, properly freeing each associated iPad.
bug_fix_details.verification: Test import creates student with 2 iPads, delete correctly frees both iPads now

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 1:n features working correctly. Bug in delete_student/batch_delete_students was fixed - now properly handles multiple iPad assignments per student. Tests are idempotent using timestamps. Test data: 4 students (Max 2 iPads, Anna 1, Peter 3 at limit, Lisa 1), 9 iPads (7 assigned, 2 available: IT-007, IT-008).
